symptom: asked to finish vacancy Ref X but the open app tab is a DIFFERENT opp/<ref> (e.g. GCHQ 3782 open while MI5 3788 requested)
cause: one candidate account spans MI5/MI6/GCHQ tenants; the last-navigated tab may be a different vacancy/tenant than intended
fix: BEFORE filling, read the app tab URL and confirm opp/<ref>-<slug> matches the requested Ref AND appcentre tenant (MI5=appcentre-a18, GCHQ=appcentre-3, MI6=appcentre-2); if not, navigate to the correct vacancy first

symptom: cfx.evaluate returns HTTP 500 on even '1+1' across ALL tabs while /health says browserConnected:true
cause: backend-wide /evaluate endpoint degradation (NOT the return/multi-statement gotcha, NOT one wedged tab)
fix: run cfx.health_fingerprint() -> degraded:true => HALT, do NOT blind-fill; wait ~90s idle for self-heal then re-probe, or authorize cfx.restart_engine() (drops tabs; login+server-side eform progress persist). Never fill/submit an eform while eval is 500ing

symptom: MI5 tenant for this candidate account is appcentre-1/brand-5/user-4309937 (NOT appcentre-a18 as the NOTES table says); GCHQ=appcentre-3/brand-7 same account
cause: one login spans tenants but each tenant has its own appcentre-N path; the NOTES table's appcentre-a18 is stale for this account
fix: find the app via candidate/application list per tenant; 3788 Cyber Research Engineer = application 3478191 / eform 7743964 on appcentre-1/brand-5

symptom: CV section is a PASTE textarea (datafield_391287_1_1), NOT a file upload
cause: the agencies' system 'will not accept' uploaded files for security; CV must be pasted as plain text
fix: extract plain text from the master resume and set the textarea via HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype value setter

symptom: clicking Submit on the main eform advances to a SECOND eform (e.g. 7743964 -> 7744057 'Helpful Hint') instead of a thank-you page
cause: some vacancies chain a secondary eform after the main application submit
fix: the main app IS submitted — VERIFY via candidate/application list (status shows 'Submitted <date time>'); the second eform is separate/secondary, not a required continuation of the main submit

symptom: Personal Details stays 'incomplete' on some eform instances — the 'Where did you hear about this job?' select (datafield_386995) reverts to empty on continue
cause: that select's option-value set differs per eform instance; a value/option that was valid on one vacancy's eform (e.g. 3781) is not committed on another's (e.g. 3685) and reverts on continue_button
fix: dump THAT instance's live options first (Array.from(sel.options).map(o=>[o.value,o.text])), pick a valid one, set value + dispatch change, then re-open the eform after continue and confirm the value stuck before trusting completion — do not reuse another eform's option value blindly

symptom: cfx.evaluate (python module) is unreliable on these VacancyFiller pages — stale-tab NoneType returns + intermittent 500s
cause: heavy multi-page SPA + the documented per-tab eval corruption; the python cfx.evaluate path flakes more than the shell path here
fix: use cfx.sh eval (the stable path) throughout on applicationtrack eforms; recover a corrupted tab on a fresh tab; retry small queries

symptom: agent hand-audits the MI5/MI6/GCHQ board and applies to SENIOR (Lead/Senior/Principal) or off-tier roles (e.g. Lead Cyber Research Engineer 3789, Senior Cyber Security Engineer 3790) — off-profile
cause: driving the board by eyeball bypasses the canonical check_title/precheck seniority+tier screen (applicant is junior-mid)
fix: run every board opp title through check_title BEFORE applying: skip seniority_flag=True (Lead/Senior/Principal/Head/Deputy Director) and eligible=False titles. Only apply to junior-mid, in-tier roles. Do NOT eyeball 'borderline on-profile'.

symptom: County select (31824) reverts to empty on continue -> Personal Details stays incomplete (stalled 3685/3790)
cause: County is a DEPENDENT select on Country (31776); setting County before Country (or without waiting for it to populate) doesn't stick
fix: set Country FIRST, wait for the dependent County options to populate, THEN set County; re-read to confirm before continue

symptom: some vacancies have EXTRA role-specific required fields not in the standard set (e.g. 3685 needed 'preferred location' 1024141=London/770); a blind bulk driver clicks submit and stalls
cause: required field set varies per vacancy eform instance
fix: after filling each section, check for empty required fields (use diagnose.py culprits / the section tracker), fill them, and verify the section flips to complete BEFORE advancing — this is what autofill.py already does; drive via autofill.py, not a blind /tmp driver
